      "text": "Un wiꞥſch peezaſ Stab-
as / unwiꞥſch Rahſischus / un
wiꞥſch pahrwilke winna Wir-

Selta/ un winna peezaſ Rahjas
ija no Warra.
"

    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "sta Selta/ pufſtrech Ohleſchu
biſa winna Gaxxums / un pufs
ohtr Ohleſchu winna Plattums.
7. Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan di-
wi Kerubim/no Selta/zeeta Dar-
ba darrija wiꞥſch tohs / no abbe-
jeem Galleem ta Salihdsinaſcha-
nas-Wahka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Weenn Kerubu weenâ Gal-
lâ/un weenu Kerubu ohtrâ Gallâ/
is paſcha Salihdsinaschanas-
Wahka darrija wiꞥſch tohs Keru-
bim/ wiꞥſch abbejôs Gallôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un tee Kerubim iſſteepe tohs
Spahrnus us aufschu / apfah-
dami ar jaweem Spahrneem to
Salihdsinaschanas-Wahku / un
winnu Waigi biſa weens ohtram
pretti/ to Kerubinu Waigi ſtatti-
jahs us to Salihdsinaschanas-
Wahkn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Wiꞥſch darrija arridsan
weenu Galdu no Sittim-Rohka/
Diwi Ohlektis biſa winna Gar-
xums / un weena Ohlektis winna
Plattums / un pufſohtr Ohle-
schu winna Augſiums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un wiꞥſch pahrwilke to ar
schkihſtu Selta/ un darrija tam
weenu felta Krohni apkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Wiꞥſch darrija tam arri-
dsan weenu Kantu apkahrt/ wee-
nas Plaukſtes (Augſtuma)/ un
wiꞥſch darrija weenu Selta Kroh-
ni apkahrt winna Kantu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Wiꞥſch lehje arridsan
tſchetruſ felta Rinkus pee ta/
un liſke tohs Rinkus pee teem
tſchetreem Stuhreem / kas pee
winna tſchetrahm Rahjahm biſa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,

      "text": "14.Tee
